hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",d.get(\"path\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "."); bash "$REPO/scripts/doc-reminder.sh" "$FILE"; fi || true'
